title: Policy Gradient Algorithms
learningObjectives: Implement Vanilla Policy Gradient (VPG) with GAE-Lambda advantage estimation in PyTorch and TensorFlow.
Explain TRPO's KL-divergence constraint, the conjugate gradient trick, and why it avoids catastrophic policy updates.
Describe PPO-Clip's clipped surrogate objective and explain the asymmetric behavior for positive and negative advantages.
Tune the key hyperparameters of VPG, TRPO, and PPO: steps_per_epoch, lam, clip_ratio, and target_kl.
Distinguish the on-policy nature of VPG/TRPO/PPO from off-policy methods and explain why on-policy data freshness matters.
